faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Canarsie?

faqs.question: When is tick season in Canarsie, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Canarsie from April through November, with peak activity in spring and fall. However, mild winters near Jamaica Bay can allow tick activity year-round. We recommend preventative treatments starting in early spring and continuing through fall to protect your family during outdoor activities at local parks and waterfront areas.
